executive_summary: Subscription model at $29/month yields strong unit economics (LTV/CAC 5.7x, payback 2.2 months) validated by 6 model precedents including Talkspace and Terapify, though CAC and gross margin assumptions are estimated from adjacent benchmarks rather than directly observed for LATAM teen mental health — score 79/100.
score_reasoning:
Score: 79/100
- LTV/CAC Ratio: 21/25 (ratio 5.70 base, 4.56 worst-case; tier 19-25 for >4.0 with 2+ benchmarks; middle third because CAC $35 and gross margin 55% are estimated from adjacent benchmarks — Talkspace public GM 43-48%, WeAreFounders healthcare churn 7.5%, Usermaven pharma CAC $178 adjusted for LATAM)
- Revenue Model Validation: 20/25 (6 companies with same/similar model: Talkspace subscription telemental health, BetterHelp D2C subscription, Terapify LATAM per-session, Sanarai LATAM bilingual therapy, Kooth B2G youth mental health, Pure Mente LATAM freemium app; tier 19-25 for 6+ in same segment, lower third as exactly 6 and 4 well-documented)
- Payback Period: 22/25 (2.19 months base, 2.74 months worst sensitivity; tier 19-25 for <7mo with 2+ benchmarks; upper-middle third — even at $100 CAC payback would be 6.27mo still in top tier)
- Pricing Power: 16/25 ($15-$109 range = 7.3x, 2+ premium players BetterHelp/Talkspace, BUT Kooth $680M B2G free-to-user model in exact target segment youth mental health is significant pricing headwind; tier 13-18 for 1+ free alternative in segment, middle third)
Total: 21 + 20 + 22 + 16 = 79

data.recommended_model: Freemium subscription (B2C) with B2B/B2G expansion path

pricing_suggestion.notes: Base $29/mo includes unlimited AI triage + 1 therapist session/month; Premium $49/mo adds 2 sessions + priority access. Calibrated to LATAM mid-range ($15-30/session) with high pain intensity justifying upper range.

assumptions: A1: ARPU $29/mo based on LATAM competitive benchmark mid-to-high range (pain intensity high)
A2: Monthly churn 8% — between subscription consumer 5-10% and Headspace 13%, adjusted for therapist-involving switching cost
A3: Gross margin 55% — Talkspace at 43-48% includes full therapist compensation; AI triage model has lower therapist cost component
A4: CAC $35 — LATAM digital health estimate; between $1 mobile baseline and $178 pharma benchmark

evidence.quote: Talkspace Q1 2025: revenue up 15% to $52.2M, fifth consecutive profitable quarter. Gross margin 44.6%. Insurance-covered therapy sessions increased 29%, with revenue from payer business increasing 35% to $40.5M.
Healthcare SaaS monthly churn rate: 7.5%, with a 67% increase from 2024 to 2025. Healthcare SaaS CAC: SMB $500-700, Mid-Market $700-900, Enterprise $900-1100.
Pharmaceutical CAC ~$178 combined ($196 organic, $160 paid). Medical Device CAC ~$628 combined. Healthy benchmark is LTV:CAC ratio of 3:1 or 4:1.
